case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ANDY TA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TA, ANDY $13,714.89 PRINCIPAL, $1,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,604.45 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,389.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
